subcodes.first_line: O esteemed neighbor! Bahá'u'lláh hath laid great emphasis upon the obligations toward neighbors, that one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای همسایه محترمه حضرت بهاء الله در حق همسایگان سفارش موکد فرمودند که انسان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @The Holy Spirit, @hospitality, @service to others; to the Cause of God
